name: "Feature Request"
about: "New feature or enhancement"
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["track:feature"]
---

## Feature

### Problem / Motivation
<!-- REQUIRED: What problem does this solve? Why is it needed now? -->

### Proposed Solution
<!-- REQUIRED: Describe the feature. Include:
- User-facing behavior (what the user sees/does)
- Technical approach (how it works under the hood)
- Components affected (frontend, backend, pipeline)
-->

### Component Breakdown
<!-- Which parts of the system are involved? Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Frontend (src/)
- [ ] Backend API (backend/api/)
- [ ] Pipeline (pipeline/)
- [ ] Database schema (backend/alembic/)

### API Design
<!-- If this involves API changes, define them -->
```
Method:
Path:
Request:
Response:
```

### Database Changes
<!-- If this involves schema changes -->
- Tables affected:
- New tables needed:
- Migration strategy:

### Implementation Hints
<!-- REQUIRED: Provide enough context for an implementing agent to start.
- Key files to look at
- Patterns to follow from existing code
- Gotchas or constraints
-->

### Dependencies
- Depends on: #
- Blocks: #

### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- REQUIRED: Definition of done -->
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ] Tests cover the new functionality
